rationale: SDAM spec requires command errors on find/getMore to reset server state; driver did not comply.
Test performance issue: test uses insert_one loop instead of insert_many; no spec behavior involved.
Doctest failure due to unexpected server-returned fields in writeErrors; test infrastructure/docs issue.
Flaky mock timer test for transactions; CI/test reliability issue, not a spec behavior violation.
CI test failure for auth thread test; no spec behavior described, related to SERVER issue.
Test failure kill_cursors with tuple on sharded cluster with auth; CI/test issue, no specific spec rule cited.
current_op not using CodecOptions on 3.2+; internal API inconsistency, not a cross-driver spec requirement.
Doctests fail with 'not master' when primary is not on default port; docs/test infrastructure issue.
GridFS should issue a single find command for all chunks per retryable reads spec; driver did not.
Flaky test: floating-point comparison fails for lastWriteDate; timing/test reliability issue.
Doctest failure due to unexpected TypeRegistry in repr output; documentation test breakage.
Documentation improvement: clarify that limit=0 means no limit; docs change only.
Documentation improvement for explain() verbosity mode; no spec behavior violated.
Refactor TypeCodecBase to use ABC; internal API design improvement, no spec involvement.
MongoClient doesn't accept type_registry kwarg; internal API bug unrelated to any spec requirement.
Feature request for default database name from URI; ergonomic API improvement, not a spec conformance issue.
Driver sends '$comment' instead of 'comment' for distinct/count; direct spec field name violation.
Spec says driver SHOULD error when transactions unsupported (maxWireVersion<7); driver 3.7 does not raise error.
Coverity-flagged memory leaks in C extensions; static analysis/performance issue, no spec rule violated.
Flaky change stream test failures; CI/test reliability issue, not a driver spec deviation.
Thread-safety bug in BSON encoder dict iteration; implementation concurrency issue, not a BSON spec violation.
Deprecation warning for min/max without hint; driven by server change SERVER-39567, not a spec requirement.
Feature request: support TypeCodecs in Collection.distinct; internal API enhancement, no spec involved.
Regression in RawBSONDocument size validation; internal implementation regression, no BSON spec rule cited.
RawBSONDocument iteration doesn't preserve field order; BSON spec preserves order but this is an implementation gap.
Feature request: support TypeCodecs in ChangeStreams; API enhancement, no spec conformance issue.
MockupDB test failure for not-master find_one on v3.8 branch; test infrastructure failure, no spec violation described.
Spec tests for findAndModify accidentally send returnDocument as command argument; spec test file fix needed.
User support issue: replica set member connection to Atlas fails on Ubuntu; no spec behavior involved.
DRIVERS-649 spec requirement: discard ServerSessions involved in network errors; driver improvement to comply.
C module accesses private Python attribute _ObjectId__id directly; internal implementation issue, not a spec violation.
AttributeError in Cursor.__del__ when __init__ fails; Python lifecycle bug, no spec involvement.
ChangeStream does not pass batch_size to underlying cursor aggregate command; spec-required parameter ignored.
MockupDB aggregate test failures caused by another PYTHON ticket; test infrastructure breakage.
SrvMonitor AttributeError in test suite; internal test error, tests still pass, no spec behavior violated.
CI test failure on Ubuntu 12.04 with server 3.6 sharded; environment/build issue, no spec behavior described.
Unhelpful error message parsing $date without time offset in json_util; UX/error message issue.
CI configuration: add MongoDB 4.2 testing to Evergreen; no spec behavior involved.
Intermittent CMAP wait queue fairness test failure; flaky CI test, not a driver spec violation.
Fix result assertion in change stream spec test per DRIVERS-677; spec test file correction.
Change stream spec test blocks forever due to server change SERVER-37786/SPEC-1214; spec test needs updating.
DRIVERS-650: driver should not resume after NonRetryableChangeStreamError label; spec requirement not implemented.
Documentation update and constant addition for wildcard index support; docs/API improvement, not a conformance bug.
GridFS spec says store length as Int64; driver stores as Int32. Go driver also affected. Explicit spec quote cited.
DRIVERS-679: use runOn syntax in CRUD test YAML files; spec test format/schema update.
Deprecate Database.current_op helper in favor of $currentOp aggregation stage; API deprecation, no spec violation.
DRIVERS-574/SPEC-1160: add YAML tests for deleteMany/updateMany with retryWrites=true; test infrastructure addition.
SRV spec requires minimum 3-part hostname; driver incorrectly accepts 1 and 2-part hostnames.
Changelog entry for ObjectId spec update already implemented in PYTHON-1619; documentation/release task.
Improvement request to report which invalid SRV record was rejected; UX/error message enhancement, not a spec violation.
